title: NATUROPATHIC MIDWIFERY - 211info
text: TOWER OF HEALTH LLC NATUROPATHIC MIDWIFERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides naturopathic midwifery care, including preconception, pregnancy, prenatal, postpartum, and parent and infant aftercare services. Doula services offered along with birth classes. 10175 SW Barbur Boulevard Suite 300 BB Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Must be pregnant or post partum Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 464-6911 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 464-6911 Main phone Physician (503) 406-8062 Message Phone Main phone (503) 464-6911 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to make an appointment FEES: Private insurance, OHP, sliding scale available DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near Ross Island Bridge and I-5 exit across from Swan Mart Services: Childbirth Education Doula Services Midwifery Postpartum Care Prenatal Care Other Services Offered At This Location: SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - NATUROPATHIC PRIMARY OR SPECIALTY CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TOWER OF HEALTH LLC
